# Payload.IsValidResultType method

Returns `true` when *value* is exactly a non-null JSON string — the open `ResultType` discriminator (§3.6). Any string is structurally valid; recognition of a specific value is the job of [`IsKnownResultType`](./IsKnownResultType.md).

```csharp
public static bool IsValidResultType(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate node. |

## Return Value

`true` when the node is a JSON string.
